# Nomula Kabeer Das

> Community leader and candidate for Ward Councillor serving Doctors Colony,
> Saroor Nagar and LB Nagar, Hyderabad (Rangareddy, Telangana — 500035).
> Retired All-India BSNL union leader. Former President of Jinkala Bavi Colony.
> Known for bringing every political party together to get development done.

## About

Nomula Kabeer Das (నోముల కబీర్ దాస్ / नोमुला कबीर दास) is a long-serving community
leader in the Saroor Nagar and LB Nagar area of Hyderabad, Telangana. As President
of Jinkala Bavi (JB) Colony, he worked across BJP, Congress and TRS to deliver
development without letting politics get in the way. For decades he served as an
All-India union leader for BSNL, and is now retired. He is a candidate for Ward
Councillor.

## Development work (infrastructure)

- Underground drainage system for JB Colony — ending waterlogging and open drains.
- Proper roads laid for JB Colony, connecting families safely.
- Securing dangerous, loose electric wires to protect families and children.
- Bringing BJP, Congress and TRS leaders together for the colony's development.

## Community work

- Led the building of a Hanuman temple in Jinkala Bavi Colony.
- Organised the International Day of Yoga at the historic Victoria Memorial Home,
  bringing together students, families and residents.

## Areas served

Doctors Colony · Saroor Nagar · LB Nagar · Jinkala Bavi Colony · Rangareddy,
Hyderabad, Telangana — 500035.

## Languages

The website is available in English, Telugu (తెలుగు) and Hindi (हिन्दी).
